questions: What practical Facebook Ads guidance does Ladder.io provide?
How should teams approach testing and scaling on Facebook?
qa.answer: Guidance covers creative testing frameworks, audience structuring, budgeting, and iterative optimization. Emphasis on rapid experimentation, learning agendas, and scaling winners while controlling CPA/ROAS.
implication: Run structured creative sprints; log hypotheses and results.
Use consolidated structures to gather signals; scale with guardrails.
Monitor CAC/payback; reallocate on marginal incremental returns.
